name: Currency by construction
intent: FEAT-011's member set: stored substrate state converges with derivable truth through the engine's own machinery. Members, in dependency order: TASK for rollup-consulting gate satisfaction (isCompleted unification, the FGAP-116 mechanism fix), derived-status invariant class, context-reconcile op v1, converge-on-write rollup stamping, delta-scoped write-time invariant evaluation, typed stale_conditions + citation content-pins, always-on drift surfacing in currentState, and the substrate-derived-state convention (resolving the milestone schema's dangling canon citation). Invariant every member preserves: the engine never fabricates authored judgment, and pre-existing substrates stay loadable/writable (expand-contract; legacy degrades, never breaks). Design basis composed verbatim from FEAT-011 + analysis/2026-07-05-currency-foreclosure-shape.md.
goal: FEAT-011 criteria 1-8 met (criterion 9's residue statement rides the surfacing/reconcile tasks' docs); FGAP-116 closed; a currentState read never self-contradicts; divergence a write would create is surfaced at that write; fired research staleness is machine-flagged.
